description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a coordinated athletic tracksuit, featuring a zip-up jacket and matching pants with side stripes. The individual is bald and wears glasses, giving a distinctive and recognizable appearance. The tracksuit has a fitted cut, with ribbed cuffs at the wrists and ankles, and a visible logo or emblem on the left chest. The figure is wearing low-profile athletic sneakers, which complement the sporty outfit. The hands are relaxed and open at the sides, and the overall build is average, with a natural, upright posture. The facial features are neutral, and the figure appears ready for casual or athletic activity in an urban environment.
description: An adult male in a fitted athletic tracksuit with glasses and sneakers, standing upright with a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, glasses, zip-up tracksuit with logo, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, glasses, and the side stripe on the tracksuit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tracksuit, bald head, and the fit of the pants and jacket.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, glasses, and side stripe details.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tracksuit with zip-up jacket and matching pants, ribbed cuffs, and a visible logo
